name: Semantic Arch Card Search
description: Embedding-based (vector) search over architecture cards, surfaced in the ArchPanel search box. The detector CLI mcp-core/arch-search.mjs reads .code-workbench/.arch/*.json under --root, flattens each card (name + description + files + guidelines + anti_patterns + decisions + dependsOn + tags) into one embedding document, and ranks them against --query via semantic-search.mjs semanticScores() (local all-MiniLM-L6-v2 through @xenova/transformers, mean-pooled + L2-normalized cosine, on-disk vector cache). Prints a JSON array of {slug, score} best-first, or [] when the model is unavailable — the same graceful-degradation contract code-search.mjs uses. Spawned by scan-runner.cjs runArchSearch (mirrors runCodeSearch: spawnDetector + validate), exposed to the host as scanHost.searchArchCards(ctx, repoPath, query, limit?), and reached from the webview via the ArchPanel's `search` RPC in buildArchRpcHandlers. The bundled detector is dist/mcp-server/arch-search.mjs (esbuild entry mcp-server/arch-search; @xenova/transformers stays external). In the UI, ArchPanel debounces the query (200ms), calls api.search, and — when it returns hits — orders cards by the ranking (keeping the stronger half of the corpus plus any exact substring matches), showing a "semantic" badge; an empty result falls back to substring filtering.
guidelines: arch-search.mjs must print [] (not error) when semanticScores returns null so callers substring-fall-back — same as code-search.
Keep the CLI basename guard (path.basename === 'arch-search.mjs') so the file doesn't self-run when bundled into another script and corrupt stdio.
New detector CLIs need: an esbuild mcp-server/* entry, an mcp-core package.json export (./arch-search.mjs), and a scan-runner runner + its .d.ts/.d.cts decl.
anti_patterns: Don't embed cards on the extension host — the model + transformers live in the spawned Node detector process (ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE), reached via spawnDetector.
Don't require @xenova/transformers — it's an optional external dep; absence must degrade to substring search, not crash.
